title: Glowing
description: Use Optifine/ConnectedTextureMod/Vanilla(CoreShaders) format to make some things glow or emissive for vanilla.
body:
Glowing

Use Optifine/ConnectedTextureMod/CoreShaders format let some things glowed or emissive for vanilla.

Features

Now is glow on these things:

- All ores(Include ancient debris and gilded blackstone) - Structure blocks - Redstone components - Lapis and redstone block - Four stages of amethyst - Chorus flower - Command block - Enchanting table - The ender eye inserted in end portal frame - Brewing stand - Raw ore blocks - ...and more ## Format Currently, three formats are using.(Maybe I will make JMX format. [Here](https://github.com/7777777-4547/Glowing-JMX)) > **Format compatibilities:**
> Optifine > ConnectedTextureMod, because CTM format is made by modifying the model. And then, this pack changed target's and redstone dust's blockstates, which maybe caused some other pack's compatibility.

Vanilla(CoreShaders):

- block, item, entity support. - Maybe not work with some mods(Like [Sodium]([https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)))

Optifine:

- block, item, entity support. - [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)(For snapshot, use [OptiKai](https://livzmc.net/optikai/downloads))/[Continuity 2.0.0+](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/)&[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) required.(Forge use [Connectedness](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectedness)&[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)) - Just support optifine emissive format's mods are required.(Like [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive))

ConnectedTextureMod:

- only block support. - [CTM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm)/[CTMF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm-fabric) required. - 1.18/.1 Fabric need [CTM Fabric Update Port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm-fabric-update-port). - 1.18.2+ Fabric need [CTM Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-refabricated).

Backport to old mc version? (Plan?)

**Full and real time's plan is [here](https://github.com/7777777-4547/Glowing/issues/2).**
I will, but only when I have time to do it: - OF will backport to 1.8&1.7 - CTM will backport to 1.15&1.12(Maybe I can't backport it, because that is too hard)

Mods support?

This pack only for vanilla things, Glowing Extra [in dev] is support for mods (Or try this unofficial fork/addon: GLOWING+)
